description: Central registry of Splunkbase app metadata and deployment-role placement for this repo. Used by the cloud installer, batch scripts, tests, and generated deployment docs as the single source of truth for package identity and role support.

deployment_role_descriptions.search-tier: Search heads or search-head clusters that host app UI, REST handlers, dashboards, macros, and search-time knowledge objects.
deployment_role_descriptions.indexer: Indexing tier where index-time parsing or indexer-side knowledge objects belong.
deployment_role_descriptions.heavy-forwarder: Customer-managed full Splunk Enterprise instance used for data collection, parsing, or forwarding.
deployment_role_descriptions.universal-forwarder: Lightweight forwarder tier used where the package or workflow is explicitly forwarder-safe.
deployment_role_descriptions.external-collector: Non-Splunk runtime such as SC4S, SC4SNMP, containers, or Kubernetes workloads that send data into Splunk.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-catalyst-ta-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-catalyst-enhanced-netflow-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Manual install on HF/UF you control
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: No app-local config; validate the NetFlow/IPFIX receiver path on the same target
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Optional forwarder-side mappings for extra Enterprise Networking NetFlow dashboards.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-appdynamics-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Configure the AppDynamics controller account and data inputs after install.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-security-cloud-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via CiscoSecurityCloud custom admin handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Multi-product Cisco Security integration app with product-specific setup flows for each packaged integration.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-secure-access-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via `org_accounts`, `update_settings`, and related app APIs
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Secure Access automation installs both the event add-on and dashboard app, then covers org onboarding plus dashboard settings/bootstrap.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-secure-access-setup` add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Add-on event inputs and log-index settings
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Required companion add-on for Secure Access, Umbrella, and Cloudlock event-log ingestion.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-app-install` Webex add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Configure Webex REST API inputs in the add-on UI or vendor docs
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Install-only route from `cisco-product-setup`; product-specific input automation is not implemented in this repo.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-app-install` Cisco UCS add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Configure UCS Manager inputs in the add-on UI or supported Splunk docs
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Install-only route from `cisco-product-setup`; product-specific input automation is not implemented in this repo.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-app-install` Cisco ESA add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Configure ESA log forwarding or SC4S collection outside this repo
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Install-only route from `cisco-product-setup`; product-specific input automation is not implemented in this repo.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-app-install` Cisco WSA add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Configure WSA log forwarding or SC4S collection outside this repo
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Install-only route from `cisco-product-setup`; product-specific input automation is not implemented in this repo.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-app-install` Cisco Talos intelligence
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase for supported ES Cloud stacks
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Finish setup in the supported Enterprise Security / SOAR workflow
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Install-only route from `cisco-product-setup`; Splunk documents this app for Splunk Enterprise Security Cloud.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-meraki-ta-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Dashboard macro alignment after install.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-intersight-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Index creation uses ACS.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-dc-networking-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via custom account/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Index creation uses ACS.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-enterprise-networking-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST for macros/saved searches/datamodel settings
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Visualization app only; installer auto-adds required TA `7538` when missing. Optional Enhanced Netflow add-on `6872` should be offered separately when users want extra NetFlow dashboards.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-product-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Delegates to the routed Cisco app install path for the resolved product
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Delegates to the routed Cisco setup skill after resolving the SCAN catalog product name
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Top-level Cisco product orchestrator. Uses the packaged SCAN catalog plus local overrides to resolve a product name, classify gaps, and run the matching setup workflow.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-scan-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Search-tier REST validation and optional S3 catalog sync
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Search-head-only catalog app; no data inputs, indexes, or forwarder deployment.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-thousandeyes-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST for OAuth account, HEC-based streaming inputs, polling inputs
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Requires HEC token. OAuth device code flow for auth. ITSI integration optional.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-itsi-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: No post-install REST config needed
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Premium product; requires ITSI license. Enables ThousandEyes ITSI integration.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-enterprise-security-install`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Splunk Support coordinated ES service workflow
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: `splunk-enterprise-security-config` validation plus Splunk Support for Cloud-managed indexer-side changes
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Premium SIEM product. On-prem installs prefer the local ES package when present, fall back to Splunkbase app 263, then run essinstall.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-enterprise-security-config`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No additional app install; requires ES already provisioned
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST validation and supported search-tier settings; Splunk Cloud indexer-side changes remain support-managed
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Operational ES configuration workflow for indexes, roles, CIM data models, enrichment, detections, risk, and validation.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-ai-assistant-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: App-local settings and activation happen in the app UI
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Search-tier app only. Splunk Cloud installs stay on the public Splunkbase path; Enterprise uses cloud-connected activation after install.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-mcp-server-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS private app upload or vetted local package
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST for mcp.conf settings, token policy, and rate limits; local JSON policy overlays remain package-content concerns
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Search-tier MCP endpoint for Splunk with encrypted token issuance and shared Cursor/Codex/Claude Code bridge rendering.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-agent-management-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Not a Splunk Cloud install path; renders customer-managed Agent Management assets
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Rendered serverclass.conf, deployment apps, and deploymentclient.conf for Enterprise deployment-server style workflows
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Splunk Enterprise 10.x Agent Management workflow for full Enterprise instances, forwarders, and OTel fleet overview.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-workload-management-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Not a Splunk Cloud install path; configures self-managed Enterprise Workload Management
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Rendered workload_pools.conf, workload_rules.conf, workload_policy.conf, and local reload helpers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Linux-only Enterprise workflow for cgroups-backed workload pools, workload rules, and admission-rule guardrails.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-hec-service-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; Splunk Cloud HEC tokens are managed through ACS
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Enterprise inputs.conf rendering or Splunk Cloud ACS HEC token payloads and helper commands
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Reusable HEC platform service workflow for allowed indexes, default source/sourcetype, TLS, and ACK-aware token handling.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-federated-search-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; Federated Search is native platform configuration on the Federated Search Head
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST apply path (`apply-rest.sh`) targets Splunk Cloud `/services/data/federated/{provider,index,settings/general}` directly; Splunk Cloud cannot edit federated.conf, so `aws_s3` providers are rendered as REST payloads with AWS Glue/S3/KMS prerequisites docs; admin user must hold `admin_all_objects`
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Complete Federated Search product surface: FSS2S (`type=splunk`) standard or transparent mode with multi-provider/multi-index render, FSS3 (`type=aws_s3`, Splunk Cloud only) REST payloads, file-based and REST apply paths, global federated-search enable/disable, SHC `conf_replication_include.indexes` deployer asset, and live `connectivityStatus` probe.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-index-lifecycle-smartstore-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Not a Splunk Cloud install path; SmartStore is managed by Splunk Cloud
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Rendered self-managed Enterprise SmartStore indexes.conf, server.conf, and limits.conf assets for indexers or cluster managers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Self-managed index lifecycle workflow for remote volumes, retention limits, cache manager settings, remote-storage localization limits, and cluster bundle apply.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-monitoring-console-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Not a Splunk Cloud app install; Cloud Monitoring Console is Splunk-managed
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Rendered self-managed Enterprise Monitoring Console local configuration plus review-only distsearch.conf peer and group helpers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Distributed or standalone Monitoring Console workflow for auto-config, distributed search groups, forwarder monitoring, and platform alert enablement.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-stream-setup` search-tier app
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS or Splunk Cloud support workflow
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Stream UI / REST on search tier
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cloud deployment is hybrid, not single-target.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-stream-setup` wire-data add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS or bundled with Stream deployment
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: No special post-install config in normal flow
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Knowledge-object support for Stream search content.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-stream-setup` forwarder add-on
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Manual install on HF/UF you control
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Local HF files plus host forwarding config
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: This package runs on the heavy/universal forwarder, not the Cloud search tier.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-connect-for-syslog-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; SC4S runtime is rendered for customer-managed hosts or Kubernetes
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: ACS for indexes/HEC where available, search-tier REST for validation, rendered host/Helm assets for runtime
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: External syslog-ng collector pattern. Modeled as a workflow row rather than a Splunk app package.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-connect-for-snmp-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; SC4SNMP runtime is rendered for customer-managed Docker Compose or Kubernetes
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: ACS for indexes/HEC where available, search-tier REST for validation, rendered compose/Helm assets for runtime
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: External SNMP collector pattern. Modeled as a workflow row rather than a Splunk app package.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-observability-otel-collector-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; OTel Collector runtime is rendered for customer-managed Kubernetes clusters or Linux hosts
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Rendered Helm values, Kubernetes secret helpers, Linux installer wrappers, and optional HEC token handoff scripts using file-based tokens
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: External OpenTelemetry Collector workflow for Observability metrics, traces, profiling, Kubernetes events, discovery, auto-instrumentation, and optional Splunk Platform HEC logs with splunk-hec-service-setup handoff helpers.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-observability-dashboard-builder`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: No Splunk Cloud app install; renders Splunk Observability Cloud dashboard groups, charts, dashboards, and apply plans
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Validate and optionally apply classic Observability dashboard API payloads; access tokens stay file-based and are never placed in chat or command arguments
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Dashboard composition workflow for Observability dashboard groups, charts, variables, detector links, runbooks, rendered API payloads, and optional applies.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-enterprise-host-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Not a Splunk Cloud install path; bootstraps customer-managed Enterprise hosts only
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Local or SSH-driven Linux host bootstrap for search-tier, indexer, and heavy-forwarder roles
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Enterprise runtime bootstrap workflow for standalone or single-site clustered hosts.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `splunk-enterprise-kubernetes-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: Not a Splunk Cloud install path; renders customer-managed Splunk Enterprise Kubernetes deployments
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: Rendered SOK Helm assets or Splunk POD cluster-config.yaml and installer helpers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Self-managed Kubernetes runtime workflow for SOK S1/C3/M4 or Splunk POD on Cisco UCS.

cloud_matrix_rows.label: `cisco-spaces-setup`
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_install_path: ACS Splunkbase
cloud_matrix_rows.cloud_config_path: REST via UCC custom stream/input handlers
cloud_matrix_rows.notes: Cisco EULA license-ack required. Firehose streaming input for Cisco Spaces indoor location analytics.

skill_topologies.notes: API-driven collector app; run on the search tier or a heavy forwarder you control.
Forwarder-side field-mapping add-on for NetFlow or IPFIX receiver paths.
Collector and dashboard setup skill; use on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Product-specific Cisco Security collector app; compatible with the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Secure Access onboarding and dashboard setup app; place on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Collector app for ACI, Nexus Dashboard, and Nexus 9K data; use on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Search-time visualization app with macros, saved searches, and KV Store content.
API collector app; run on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Meraki collector app with dashboard alignment; place on the search tier or a heavy forwarder.
Product-name router that resolves a Cisco product from the SCAN catalog and delegates to the matching setup skill or explicit gap classification.
Hybrid-capable app that combines HEC push with polling and dashboard setup.
Generic package delivery skill; actual package compatibility comes from the package or app metadata.
External collector workflow that prepares Splunk-side objects and renders SC4S runtime assets.
External collector workflow that prepares Splunk-side objects and renders SC4SNMP runtime assets.

External OTel Collector workflow for Kubernetes and Linux runtimes that send data to Splunk Observability Cloud and optional Splunk Platform HEC, with HEC token handoff helpers delegated to splunk-hec-service-setup.
Splunk Observability Cloud dashboard render/apply workflow; no Splunk Platform runtime placement.
Agent Management control-plane workflow for server classes, deployment apps, and deployment clients; do not target indexer cluster peers or SHC members directly.
Self-managed Enterprise Workload Management workflow for Linux search heads and indexers.
Reusable HEC token and service configuration workflow for Enterprise HEC tiers or Splunk Cloud ACS-managed HEC.

Federated Search Head workflow covering Federated Search for Splunk (FSS2S, type=splunk) in standard or transparent mode and Federated Search for Amazon S3 (FSS3, type=aws_s3, Splunk Cloud only). Renders multi-provider/multi-index assets, file-based apply for Enterprise SHs and SHC deployers, REST apply for both Enterprise and Splunk Cloud, the global federated-search enable/disable switch, and a connectivityStatus probe.
Self-managed indexer workflow for SmartStore remote volumes, retention policy, cache manager settings, and low-level remote-storage localization limits.
Search-tier Monitoring Console workflow for distributed or standalone mode, distributed search groups, forwarder monitoring, platform alerts, and peer status review.
Linux host bootstrap workflow for self-managed Splunk Enterprise search tiers, indexers, cluster managers, SHC members, and heavy forwarders.
Self-managed Splunk Enterprise Kubernetes runtime workflow using SOK Helm assets or Splunk POD installer assets.
Premium search-tier app for ITSI dashboards and service analytics.
Search-tier workflow for ITSI content-pack bootstrap, validation, and service-topology automation.
Premium search-tier SIEM app install and essinstall workflow for standalone search heads or SHC deployers.
ES operational configuration workflow for search-tier objects and index-tier ES index readiness.
Search-tier AI assistant app with cloud-backed inference, app UI settings, and KV Store-backed local chat state.
Search-tier MCP service app with custom REST handlers, KV Store-backed tool metadata, encrypted token issuance, and optional local policy overlays.
Split-package Stream deployment: search-tier UI, forwarder-side capture, and optional indexer knowledge objects.
Cisco Spaces firehose collector app with UCC REST handlers for stream configuration and activation token encryption.
Search-head-only catalog and management app. No data ingestion — provides product catalog UI, ecosystem intelligence, and Splunkbase analytics.
